title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Oracle India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Oracle India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Oracle India in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Oracle India:
Oracle India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oracle India!
